reviews.review_description:
I would imagine that the people involved in putting this together have worked long and hard so I don't want to be too hard on them and to start on a positive it is very cheap so I have no regrets in trying it out. Now the facts: this coaster is VERY basic, from the simplistic graphics to the repetitive and bland sound effects. The environment is sparse and riding the coaster induces nausea. I didn't even bother to play it out to the end because it was just hurting my eyes...sorry guys.
To end on a positive, the idea is sound, after all who wouldn't want to ride on a rollercoaster around ancient pyramids. It just needs a lot of refining.

developer_response.body: Hi RobotOnline, We updated the roller coaster, this last version has two rides and graphics improvements, please update and review again, thank you.

reviews.review_description: Not bad for £0.79 but it could be a little faster. Enjoyable enough but the Relix coaster still the best.

developer_response.body: Hi JSAVR, We updated the app, this last version has two rides, please update and review again, thank you.

reviews.review_description: I would like to see the pyramids at night.

developer_response.body: Hi SANTO69, Nice We are very happy to know you enjoyed and had fun! We are working at a night version, very soon We will update this version, thank you very much for your suggestion and review.

reviews.review_description: Only 1 ride. Would be nice if there were several more

developer_response.body: Hi synatra999, We updated the app, this last version has two rides, please update and review again, thank you.

reviews.review_description:
The daytime ride is good however there are areas on the track where momentum slows down upside down on the loop. Train cart should have enough speed on the upside down loops and not seem like its being pulled up a hill. 

Nighttime track is even worse . Slow as hell most of track feels like its being pulled on a chain the whole ride. The shooting star is even dimmer at night then day for some reason. Its disappointingly boring slow.  Needs serious work. But the day track is enjoyable .so thats why 3! i will rate higher when flaws are worked out
This went really well with my LSD trip...  �

developer_response.body: Hi gratefuldead1974, Thank you very much for your review, We are working on new improvements very soon will be available.

reviews.review_description: This has the potential to be one of the great rollercoaster apps  but the "night mode " leaves much to be desired.  If it had a realistic moon and stars  that emphasizes the constellations. Orion impartiality, you'd have a first rate rollercoaster that I'd pay 3xs as much for...but for now I'm going to request a refund
I like the concept. If you can now do one over the city of Cairo . Now that would be awesome !

developer_response.body: Hi andre.matthews.313, I are very happy to know you liked, also your suggestion is very welcome, We are working at new update and We will consider your suggestion, thank you very much!
